name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-7
title: Invariant 5 (spec.md updated before impl-suggestion written) has no test
description: spec.md Invariant 5 states spec.md must be updated BEFORE the impl-suggestion file is written (Step 4 before Step 5). The SKILL.md encodes the order but no test asserts it. A test could parse SKILL.md and assert Step 4 appears before Step 5 in the document, or assert the two headings exist in correct order.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3: feature.json version synced to spec.md (1.2.0); tests added for Inv 3 (schema documented) and Inv 5 (Step 4 before Step 5).
